description_long: This helmet is part of a full-body armored suit, featuring a domed green helmet with a dark visor, a prominent rangefinder antenna on the right side, and a weathered, battle-worn finish. The helmet is integrated with a matching armored chest plate, gauntlets, and a jetpack, all in muted green, yellow, and brown tones. A tattered green cape drapes over the left shoulder, adding to the rugged appearance. The jetpack is cylindrical with metallic blue and yellow panels, silver thrusters, and a central missile. The suit includes padded white pants and boots, with brown gloves and utility pouches. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible wear and tear, evoking a sci-fi bounty hunter aesthetic.
description: A weathered green helmet with a dark visor, rangefinder antenna, and integrated with a full armored suit, jetpack, and tattered cape in muted colors.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the domed green helmet, rangefinder, jetpack details, and the draped green cape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the helmet's profile, rangefinder, jetpack, and the length of the cape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the jetpack's structure, cape, and the back of the helmet and suit.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the helmet's side, rangefinder, jetpack, and the arm and leg armor.
attribute_graphic_design: Weathered, solid colors with scuffed and chipped paint, no distinct patterns or motifs.
